title: Big Fungus
description: Grow thick fungus trees by planting fungi in a plus shape
body:
In vanilla Minecraft, huge fungus have a 6% chance to naturally generate with a thick stem.  
This ability is not available when you bone meal a fungus.  
This mod lets you grow huge fungi with a thick stem by placing 5 fungi in a plus shape.  
Works for both crimson and warped fungi.  

![Big Crimson Fungus vs Regular Crimson Fungus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wDjxRp0C/images/096dedab55bb1ff2ac0432c8c6808b5c4630fb5c.png)

Designed for 1.20.0-6, but might work with older versions.  
Please create an issue if you find a compatible version which is not listed.
